title: OSMM Persona Object
description: Durable, reusable Context: the human-centered understanding of who a customer is, what drives them, and how to reach them. Captures the canonical psychographic fields — triggers, goals, motivations, pain points, decision criteria, and messaging preferences — plus an optional descriptive demographic snapshot and (for B2B) a role block. Canonical schema for object_type 'persona'. The osmm-persona-builder skill references this file; it is the single source of truth for the object's shape.

osmm_version.description: OSMM schema version this instance conforms to (semantic version).

persona_id.description: Stable, human-readable id. Prefix 'PER-' + lowercase hyphen slug. Never changes once assigned; bump version instead.

version.description: Instance version (e.g. '1.0'). Bump on revision; the id stays stable.

persona_type.description: Governed persona-type vocabulary — the persona's relationship to the purchase/decision. Pick the single closest snake_case value.

summary.description: 1-2 sentences capturing who this person is and what defines them.

representative_quote.description: A short line in the persona's own voice. Voice, not description.

demographics.description: Optional descriptive snapshot of individual attributes that ground the persona. NOT targeting logic. All keys optional; include what the source provides.

income.description: Income level or band, as plain language.

triggers.description: What prompts them to act now — events or pressures that move them off the status quo.

goals.description: What they are trying to achieve.

motivations.description: The underlying drivers behind those goals.

pain_points.description: Frustrations and obstacles in their way.

objections.description: Reasons they hesitate or resist. Optional — often not stated in source material; leave empty rather than padding.

behavioral_traits.description: A handful of crisp characteristic behaviors and habits, not a data dump.

decision_criteria.description: What they weigh when choosing/buying. Plain phrases, no weights/percentages in v0.1.

messaging_preferences.description: How to communicate with them effectively.

role.description: Optional B2B detail block — title, responsibilities, influence level. Omit entirely for B2C personas. The committee role itself lives in persona_type.

influence_level.description: Influence over the decision, e.g. high | medium | low.

linked_audiences.description: Ids of Audience Objects this persona brings to life. Use 'AUD-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' until one exists.

source.description: One line: what source(s) this was built from and approximate date.
